bead.title: database-router: TenantRouter → DatabaseRouter, (tenant,database) dispatch
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] database_router.rs with DatabaseRouter + DatabaseAdapterFactory + MemoryAdapterFactory
- [ ] resolve caches per (tenant_id, database_name) pair
- [ ] Same pair returns same Arc (ptr_eq)
- [ ] Different pairs return different Arcs
- [ ] evict drops the cache entry
- [ ] 5 tests in database_router_test.rs covering caching, isolation, eviction, factory errors
- [ ] Cross-tenant data isolation test proves (a, orders) writes do NOT appear in (b, orders)
- [ ] cargo test --workspace green
- [ ] cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings clean
- [ ] Legacy TenantRouter untouched
